center.name: 阿穆尔州
center.summary: 阿穆尔州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括花田鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was known only in two locations in Manchuria and southeastern Siberia, separated by more than 1000 km; however, in 2018, a new breeding population was found in the Amur region, situated between the two
